feed:
<%- config.title %> <%- config.subtitle %> <link href="<%- url_for(config.feed.path) %>" rel="self"/> <link href="<%- config.url %>"/> <%# Use the most-recently-updated post date instead of new Date() so the feed root field does not change on every build when no content has actually changed. %> <%- posts.length > 0 ? posts.first().updated.toISOString() : '2020-01-01T00:00:00.000Z' %> <%- config.url %>/
<%- config.author %>
<% posts.each(function(post){ %>
<%- post.title %> <link href="<%- post.permalink %>"/> <%- post.permalink %> <%- post.date.toISOString() %> <%- post.updated.toISOString() %> <% if (post.tags && post.tags.length){ %> <% post.tags.each(function(tag){ %> <category term="<%- tag.name %>"/> <% }); %> <% } %>
<% }); %>
